daemonIdleTimeout.description: Seconds before daemon shuts down from inactivity (0 = never)

embedPort.description: Port for hindsight-embed server (auto-assigned if not specified)

bankMission.description: Mission stamped onto the bank's reflect_mission column on first use. Only affects the /reflect operation — does not steer retain or recall. Leave unset (or empty) to manage missions out-of-band via PATCH /banks/{id}.
bankMission.default: You are an AI assistant helping users across multiple communication channels (Telegram, Slack, Discord, etc.). Remember user preferences, instructions, and important context from conversations to provide personalized assistance.

retainMission.description: Mission stamped onto the bank's retain_mission column on first use. Steers what gets extracted as facts during retain. Leave unset to use built-in extraction rules.

observationsMission.description: Mission stamped onto the bank's observations_mission column on first use. Controls what gets synthesised into observations during consolidation.

embedVersion.description: hindsight-embed version to use (e.g. 'latest', '0.4.2', or empty for latest)

llmModel.description: LLM model to use (e.g. 'gpt-4o-mini', 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022'). Used with llmProvider.

llmApiKey.description: API key for the LLM provider used by the Hindsight memory daemon. Set via 'openclaw config set ... --ref-source env --ref-id OPENAI_API_KEY' to reference an env var without storing plaintext.

llmBaseUrl.description: Optional base URL override for OpenAI-compatible providers (e.g. 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1').

embedPackagePath.description: Local path to hindsight package for development (e.g. '/path/to/hindsight'). When set, uses 'uv run --directory <path>' instead of 'uvx hindsight-embed@latest'.

apiPort.description: Port for the openclaw profile daemon (default: 9077)

hindsightApiUrl.description: External Hindsight API URL (e.g. 'https://mcp.hindsight.devcraft.team'). When set, skips local daemon and connects directly to this API.

hindsightApiToken.description: API token for external Hindsight API authentication. Required if the external API has authentication enabled.

dynamicBankId.description: Enable per-user memory banks. When true, memories are isolated by user per channel (e.g., slack-U123, telegram-456789). When false, all users share a single 'openclaw' bank.

bankId.description: Static bank ID used when dynamicBankId is false.

bankIdPrefix.description: Optional prefix for bank IDs (e.g., 'prod' results in 'prod-slack-U123'). Useful for separating environments.

retainTags.description: Tags applied to every retained document (e.g. ['source_system:openclaw', 'agent:agentname']).

retainSource.description: Source value written into retained document metadata. Defaults to 'openclaw'.

autoRecall.description: Automatically recall memories on every prompt and inject them as context. Set to false when agent has its own recall tool.

excludeProviders.description: Message providers to exclude from recall and retain (e.g. ['heartbeat', 'telegram', 'discord'])

dynamicBankGranularity.description: Fields used to derive bank ID. Controls memory isolation granularity. Default: ['agent', 'channel', 'user'].

autoRetain.description: Automatically retain conversation as memories after each interaction. Set to false to disable.

retainRoles.description: Message roles to include in retained transcript. Default: ['user', 'assistant'].

retainFormat.description: Serialization format for retained conversation content. 'json' (default) emits a structured array of {role, content} messages, matching the Claude Code integration. 'text' emits the legacy '[role: x] ... [x:end]' markers.

retainToolCalls.description: When true (default) and retainFormat is 'json', each message's content is an Anthropic-shaped array of typed blocks including tool_use (agent tool calls) and tool_result (truncated at 2000 chars). Operational MCP tools — Hindsight's own recall/retain/search — are filtered out to avoid feedback loops. Set to false to retain text-only content, one string per message.

includeSenderContext.description: When true (default), prepend a session context block (sender, channel, provider) to retained transcripts so similarity search can distinguish memories by speaker even when dynamicBankGranularity does not include 'user'. Set false to omit.

retainEveryNTurns.description: Retain every Nth turn instead of every turn. 1 = every turn (default). Values > 1 enable chunked retention with a sliding window.

retainOverlapTurns.description: Extra prior turns to include when chunked retention fires. Window = retainEveryNTurns + retainOverlapTurns. Only applies when retainEveryNTurns > 1.

retainDocumentScope.description: Granularity of the retained document_id. 'session' (default) groups all retains under a single document per OpenClaw session. 'turn' produces a new document per retain.

recallBudget.description: Recall effort level. Higher budgets use more retrieval strategies for better results but take longer.

recallMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for recall response. Controls how much memory context is injected per turn.

recallTypes.description: Memory types to recall. Defaults to ['observation'] — surfaces only the consolidated, deduplicated view; raw world/experience facts can drive the same answer multiple times when many memories say the same thing.

recallRoles.description: Roles to include when composing contextual recall query. Default: ['user', 'assistant'].

recallContextTurns.description: Number of user turns to include in recall query context. 1 keeps latest-message-only behavior.

recallMaxQueryChars.description: Maximum character length for composed recall query before calling recall.

recallTopK.description: Maximum number of memories to inject per turn. Applied after API response as a hard cap.

recallPromptPreamble.description: Text shown above recalled memories in the injected context block.
recallPromptPreamble.default: Relevant memories from past conversations (prioritize recent when conflicting). Only use memories that are directly useful to continue this conversation; ignore the rest:

recallTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for auto-recall in milliseconds. Increase if recall times out with high budget.

recallInjectionPosition.description: Where to inject recalled memories. 'prepend' = start of system prompt (default), 'append' = end of system prompt (preserves prompt cache), 'user' = before user message.

debug.description: Enable debug logging for Hindsight plugin operations. Equivalent to logLevel: 'debug'.

logLevel.description: Console log verbosity. 'off' = no output, 'error' = errors only, 'warning' = errors + warnings, 'info' = key events + periodic summaries, 'debug' = all details.

logSummaryIntervalMs.description: Interval in ms to batch retain/recall log summaries. 0 = log every event individually. Default: 300000 (5 min).

debugPerfTiming.description: Emit one info-level perf line per before_prompt_build (recall path) and agent_end (retain path) so you can spot whether latency is in the plugin or upstream. Format: 'perf: <hook> hook_total=Xms <hook-specific fields>'.

retainQueuePath.description: Path to JSONL file for buffering failed retains (external API mode only). Default: ~/.openclaw/data/hindsight-retain-queue.jsonl

retainQueueMaxAgeMs.description: Max age in ms for queued retain items. -1 = keep forever.

retainQueueFlushIntervalMs.description: How often to attempt flushing queued retains in ms. Default: 60000 (1 min).

ignoreSessionPatterns.description: Session key glob patterns to skip entirely (no recall, no retain). E.g. ["agent:main:**", "agent:*:cron:**"]. * matches non-colon chars, ** matches anything.

statelessSessionPatterns.description: Session key glob patterns for read-only sessions: retain is always skipped, recall is skipped when skipStatelessSessions is true. E.g. ["agent:*:subagent:**", "agent:*:heartbeat:**"].

skipStatelessSessions.description: When true (default), sessions matching statelessSessionPatterns also skip recall. When false, they can recall but never retain.

enableKnowledgeTools.description: Register agent_knowledge_* tools for explicit lookup, reflection, ingest, and knowledge-page management. Set automatically by the self-driving-agents CLI.

bankMission.label: Bank Mission (reflect)
bankMission.placeholder: Custom context for what this agent does...

retainMission.label: Retain Mission
retainMission.placeholder: Steers what gets extracted as facts during retain...

observationsMission.label: Observations Mission
observationsMission.placeholder: Controls what gets synthesised into observations...

embedVersion.label: Hindsight Embed Version
embedVersion.placeholder: latest (or pin to specific version like 0.4.2)

llmApiKey.label: LLM API Key
llmApiKey.placeholder: API key for the chosen LLM provider

hindsightApiUrl.label: External Hindsight API URL
hindsightApiUrl.placeholder: e.g. https://mcp.hindsight.devcraft.team (leave empty for local daemon)

hindsightApiToken.label: External API Token
hindsightApiToken.placeholder: API token if external API requires authentication

bankId.label: Static Bank ID
bankId.placeholder: e.g. openclaw, shared-bank (used when dynamicBankId is false)

retainToolCalls.label: Retain Tool Calls
retainToolCalls.placeholder: true (default) — include tool_use / tool_result blocks in retained JSON

includeSenderContext.label: Include Sender Context
includeSenderContext.placeholder: true (default) — prepend sender/channel/provider context to retained content

recallPromptPreamble.label: Recall Prompt Preamble
recallPromptPreamble.placeholder: Instruction shown above recalled memories in injected context

debugPerfTiming.label: Debug Perf Timing
debugPerfTiming.placeholder: false (default) — enable to log per-hook latency

enableKnowledgeTools.label: Enable Knowledge Tools
enableKnowledgeTools.placeholder: false (default) — enable agent_knowledge_* tools, including reflect
